1.name: Blood Nectar
1.description: By brewing a potion out of his own vitae, the rakta-sadhu can imbue the drinker with one level of a discipline or path.
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 62-63

2.name: Blood Nectar
2.description: By brewing a potion out of his own vitae, the rakta-sadhu can imbue the drinker with two level of a discipline or path.
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 62-63

3.name: Blood Nectar
3.description: By brewing a potion out of his own vitae, the rakta-sadhu can imbue the drinker with three level of a discipline or path.
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 62-63

4.name: Blood Nectar
4.description: By brewing a potion out of his own vitae, the rakta-sadhu can imbue the drinker with four level of a discipline or path.
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 62-63

5.name: Blood Nectar
5.description: By brewing a potion out of his own vitae, the rakta-sadhu can imbue the drinker with five level of a discipline or path.
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 62-63

1.name: Threads of the Past
1.description: Receive a vision from the past of the target.
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 63-64

2.name: Weave of the Future
2.description: Receive omens of events to come.
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 63-64

3.name: Certain Fate
3.description: Receive a certain vision of an event in the future.
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 63-64

4.name: Past Lives
4.description: Receive a moderately detailed biography of your previous incarnation.
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 63-64

5.name: Master of Samsara
5.description: Gain limited power over the future incarnation of a target.
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 63-64
